specs.case_material: Injected aluminum alloy top and injected ABS plastic bottom
specs.gpio_access: Full GPIO Access with Magnetic cover
specs.m2_nvme_expansion_options: SINGLE M.2 NVMe PCIe Expansion Board, DUAL M.2 NVMe PCIe Expansion Board
specs.product_name: Argon ONE V5 M.2 Case for Raspberry Pi 5
specs.passive_cooling: Aluminum alloy case body acts as heatsink
specs.thermal_interface: Silicon thermal pads (CPU, RP1, PMIC, RAM) + blue silicon thermal pads for M.2 drives
specs.nvme_heatsink: Argon THRML M.2 NVMe heatsink included
specs.gpio_header: 40-pin Passthrough header with magnetic cover, Top
specs.pi5_processor: Broadcom BCM2712, 2.4 GHz quad-core 64-bit Arm Cortex-A76
specs.tagline: A premium aluminum case for Raspberry Pi 5, combining active cooling, full-size HDMI output, flexible NVMe storage expansion, and a clean all-rear port layout.
specs.nvm_heatsink: Argon THRML M.2 NVMe heatsink with blue silicon thermal pads
specs.optional_ups: Argon PWR UPS for Argon ONE V5 27W PD

snapshot.description: Premium aluminium case for Raspberry Pi 5 with integrated M.2 NVMe PCIe storage support via the PCIe FPC connector. Features passive aluminium heatsink body, programmable power button, and repositioned full-size HDMI and USB-C ports. Compatible with Raspberry Pi 5 only.
features: Programmable power button with safe shutdown
All ports rear-facing for clean cable management
